# Book a Strategy Session That Turns Workforce Complexity Into a Clear Action Plan

Stop guessing about skills, hiring, career pathways, and AI impact. In one session, you’ll walk away with practical next steps to improve retention, hiring accuracy, and workforce readiness.

## Clarify role & skill gaps

Identify strengths, expose gaps, and know exactly where to act first.

## Improve retention

Make career pathways clear, visible,

and usable for your employees

## Strengthen hiring

Align hiring criteria to the skills that really drive success in your roles.

## Prepare for AI change

Know what work is changing,

and where people matter most

- Working session, not a generic demo

- Actionable outputs you can use internally

- Built for HR, talent, workforce, and transformation leaders


Loading

## What You’ll Get From the Session

This is not a surface-level conversation. It is a working session designed to help you leave with clarity, direction, and usable next steps.

## A Skills-Based View of Your Workforce

Get a clearer picture of the capabilities your key roles require and where gaps may be slowing performance, hiring, or mobility.

## Career Pathway Direction

Identify how to create visible growth pathways that strengthen retention and make internal advancement easier to understand.

## Practical Next Steps

Walk away with prioritized actions your team can use right away instead of abstract recommendations that stall after the meeting.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before booking

[Who is this session for?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

**Best for:**

- CHROs, Heads of Talent, and HR leaders
- Workforce & transformation leaders
- Talent acquisition and L&D teams

If you’re trying to improve hiring, retention, career pathways, or understand AI’s impact on your workforce—this session is designed for you.

[What will I actually get from this session?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

You’ll leave with:

- A clearer view of your workforce skills and gaps
- Direction on building or improving career pathways
- Insight into how AI may impact your roles
- A practical set of next steps you can act on immediately

This is not theoretical—you’ll walk away with something usable.

[Is this a demo or a sales pitch?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

No.

This is a **working strategy session**, not a product walkthrough.

We focus on your organization, your challenges, and your priorities—so you get value whether or not you move forward with us.

[How should I prepare?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

You don’t need to prepare much.

Just come with:

- Your biggest workforce challenge
- Any specific roles or areas you’re focused on

We’ll guide the rest.

[How long is the session?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

Most sessions run **30 minutes**, depending on your goals and scope.

We focus on making the time practical and outcome-driven.

[What happens after I submit the form?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

We’ll review your information and:

1. Confirm fit
2. Reach out to schedule
3. Align on your priorities before the session

No long back-and-forth or unnecessary steps.

[Is this relevant if we’re early in our strategy?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

Yes—and that’s actually when it’s most valuable.

We help you **clarify where to start**, so you don’t waste time or resources heading in the wrong direction.

[Is there any cost or obligation?](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/)

No obligation.

The goal is to help you get clarity and determine if there’s a strong fit to go deeper.

### Turn Workforce Uncertainty Into a Clear, Actionable Plan

Book a strategy session to identify your highest-impact opportunities across workforce planning, skills, pathways, hiring, and AI readiness.

[Book Now](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-strategy-session/#book)

# Liquid Insights

## Grounded in your roles and skills, delivering clear workforce decisions with quantified impact.

#### LIQUID INSIGHTS

Liquid Insights - YouTube

Tap to unmute

[Liquid Insights](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01k9HmwH4N0) [CareerHighways](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCftPGU0njJmfz-HbpV-LdRg)

CareerHighways2 subscribers

[Watch on](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=01k9HmwH4N0)

## Turn workforce questions into real, decision-ready answers

**Grounded in your roles and skills, delivering clear workforce**
**decisions with quantified impact.**

Ask a question. Get structured, explainable answers that show where
risk exists, what it costs, and what to do next.

**See Liquid Insights in Action**

[Explore Workforce Intelligence](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-demo/)

#### THE GAP

## DASHBOARDS SHOW DATA. DECISIONS REQUIRE INTELLIGENCE.

Workforce leaders are surrounded by metrics, reports, and dashboards-but when a critical decision needs to be made, the
answer isn’t clear.

**Traditional systems force you to:**

- Navigate disconnected views

- Interpret fragmented data

- Assemble context manually


**The question and the decision are not in the same place.**

Liquid Insights closes that gap.

![decisions-require-intelligence](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/decisions-require-intelligence.jpg)

#### THE SHIFT

![questions-to-decisions](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/questions-to-decisions.jpg)

## FROM QUESTIONS TO DECISION-READY INTELLIGENCE

Liquid Insights does not deliver reports.

It provides **structured, quantified workforce intelligence** grounded in your skills and job architecture system of record.

Every output shows:

- Where risk exists

- What is changing

- Which roles and skills are affected

- What actions to take next


**Not metrics. Not dashboards. Workforce intelligence that drives**
**action.**

## REAL INTELLIGENCE. REAL IMPACT.

## Example: 200-employee workforce analysis

Liquid Insights delivers measurable workforce outcomes based on
how work is actually performed across roles and skills.

## $4.5M-$7M in workforce risk exposure identified

Based on roles with long -ramp and human-critical skills, where replacement is slow, expensive, and disruptive. Quantifies vacancy cost, ramp time, and productivity loss.

## $340K-$530K in annual cost avoidance

Based on **skills transferability across roles,** identifying internal mobility pathways that reduce external hiring costs and accelerate time-to-productivity.

## 4-9 FTE equivalent capacity created

Based on **Al-delegable work within roles,** where workflow delegation increases output without adding headcount.

**All outputs are grounded in skills-based workforce data-not surveys, titles, or assumptions.**

#### Decision Use Cases

## WHAT DECISIONS CAN YOU ANSWER?

- Where is workforce risk-and what is it costing us?

- Where can we reduce external hiring spend?

- How can we redeploy talent we already have?

- Where can we increase output without adding headcount?


This keeps learning focused on outcomes instead of activity.

![decision-use-cases](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/decision-use-cases.jpg)

## HOW IT WORKS

**From workforce data to decision-ready intelligence**

## 1\. Connect your workforce data

Ingest roles, job structures, and organizational context.

## 2\. Build your workforce model automatically

Map roles to skills, identify adjacencies, and generate career pathways -creating a unified system of record.
**No manual setup or data modeling required.**

## 3\. Ask a workforce question

Ask about risk, gaps, mobility, productivity, or workforce strategy.

## 4\. Analyze across roles, skills, and pathways

The system evaluates workforce structure to produce quantified, explainable outputs.

## 5\. Deliver decision-ready intelligence

Receive clear actions, recommendations, and financial impact- ready
to execute.

#### Beyond Analytics

![beyond-analytics](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/beyond-analytics.jpg)

## NOT ANALYTICS. A WORKFORCE DECISION SYSTEM.

**Traditional systems**

- Show metrics

- Deliver reports

- Require interpretation


**Liquid Insights**

- Quantifies impact

- Identifies actions

- Guides decisions


**We don’t surface insights- we deliver workforce intelligence that tells you what to do and what it’s worth.**

#### Trusted by Design

## WHY TRUST THIS

Every output is grounded in your **skills and job architecture system**
**of record,** ensuring:

- **Consistent results** – same inputs, same outputs

- **Repeatable analysis** – no variability or guesswork

- **Explainable decisions** – fully traceable to workforce structure


Not estimates. Not summaries. Structured outputs based on real workforce data.

![trusted-by-design](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/trusted-by-design.jpg)

#### What Makes It Different

![liquid-insights-its-different](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/why-its-different.jpg)

## WHY IT’S DIFFERENT

Liquid Insights is not a dashboard or reporting layer.

It is a **real-time workforce intelligence system built for decisions.**

- **Intent-aware** – understands the decision behind the question

- **Skills-grounded** – built on roles, skills, and career pathways

- **Graph-powered** – connects workforce relationships and adjacencies

- **Structured outputs** – clear, explainable, decision-ready

- **Real-time execution** – updates with every question

- **Action-oriented** – delivers recommendations, not observations


## MAKE WORKFORCE DECISIONS IN MINUTES -NOT WEEKS

Move from dashboards and manual analysis to real-time, decision-ready workforce intelligence.

Understand workforce risk, reduce cost, and unlock capacity-instantly.

[Request a Demo](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-demo/)

[Talk to Career Highways](https://careerhighways.com/book-a-demo/)

### Build skills-based hiring & career pathways that actually work

A 15-minute working conversation to align on scope and next steps—then decide whether to proceed with a Strategy Session or request an Enterprise Deep-Dive.

- **Map skills to your roles:** Understand the exact skills that predict success in your openings.

- **Shorten hiring cycles:** Practical steps to create “ready talent” and reduce recruiting friction.

- **Align career pathways:** Design internal pathways that improve retention and training ROI.

This is a working conversation **tailored to the employer or workforce partner** — not a product demo.

### Are you a Job Seeker?

If you’re exploring careers, skills, or next-step opportunities, this Strategy Session is not required. Job Seekers should **sign up directly** to access the platform and self-serve resources.

[SIGN UP](https://app.careerhighways.com/)

# CAREER HIGHWAYS® Service Level Agreement

### _Effective and Last Updated: April 1, 2026_

## 1\. Definitions

**Maximum Available Minutes**: The total number of minutes in a calendar month during which the Services are scheduled to be available, excluding Permissible Downtime.

**Downtime**: Any period during which the Services are unavailable to Customer Users, excluding Permissible Downtime.

**Uptime Percentage**: Calculated as (Maximum Available Minutes – Downtime) ÷ Maximum Available Minutes × 100.

**Security Incident**: Any confirmed unauthorized access to, acquisition of, or disclosure of Customer Data, or material compromise of the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of the Services.

* * *

## 2\. Service Availability Commitment

Career Highways commits that the Services shall be available **99.0% of the time per calendar month**, excluding Permissible Downtime.

### 2.1 Permissible Downtime

Permissible Downtime includes: – Force majeure events – Failures of third-party networks, infrastructure, or services outside Career Highways’ reasonable control – Customer-caused outages, including misconfiguration or exceeding documented limits – Deployment activities, upgrades, or data model updates performed on Customer’s implementation – Troubleshooting performed at Customer’s request – Scheduled and emergency maintenance

* * *

## 3\. Maintenance Windows

### 3.1 Scheduled Maintenance

- Scheduled maintenance shall not exceed **thirty-six (36) hours per calendar year**.
- Career Highways shall provide **at least seventy-two (72) hours’ advance notice** of scheduled maintenance.

### 3.2 Emergency Maintenance

- Emergency maintenance may be performed as necessary to protect system integrity or security.
- Career Highways shall notify Customer **as soon as reasonably practicable** once emergency maintenance is identified.

* * *

## 4\. Incident Severity Levels & Response

| Severity | Description | Initial Response | Customer Notification |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Sev 1 – Critical | Complete service outage or confirmed Security Incident impacting Customer Data | ≤ 1 hour | ≤ 24 hours of confirmation |
| Sev 2 – High | Material degradation of Services with no data compromise | ≤ 4 hours | ≤ 48 hours |
| Sev 3 – Medium | Partial functionality issues, workaround available | ≤ 1 business day | Upon request |
| Sev 4 – Low | Minor issues or general inquiries | ≤ 1 business day | N/A |

Response times apply during standard business hours **except for Sev 1 – Critical incidents, which are supported on a 24×7 basis** using on-call escalation procedures appropriate for an enterprise SaaS provider.

* * *

## 5\. Security Incident Notification

In accordance with Career Highways’ Security Incident Response Plan: – Career Highways shall notify Customer **without undue delay and no later than twenty-four (24) hours** after confirming a Security Incident affecting Customer Data. – Notifications shall include, to the extent known: nature of the incident, impacted data, mitigation steps taken, and recommended Customer actions. – Career Highways shall provide ongoing updates until resolution.

* * *

## 6\. Data Protection & Security Commitments

Career Highways commits to: – Maintain administrative, technical, and physical safeguards consistent with industry standards – Enforce role-based access controls and least-privilege principles – Encrypt sensitive Customer Data at rest and in transit – Not use Customer Data to train generalized or external AI models without authorization – Ensure prompt access revocation upon personnel termination or role change

* * *

## 7\. Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery

Career Highways maintains business continuity and disaster recovery plans designed to support service resilience and data protection.

**Target Objectives (Non-Guaranteed):** – **Recovery Time Objective (RTO):** Target of **24 hours** for restoration of core platform services following a Sev 1 disruption. – **Recovery Point Objective (RPO):** Target of **24 hours**, representing the maximum intended period of potential data loss in the event of a catastrophic failure.

These targets reflect industry-standard objectives for enterprise SaaS platforms and are provided for transparency only; they are not service guarantees unless expressly agreed in a separate written addendum. – Recovery Point Objective (RPO): TBD

RTO and RPO targets may be contractually defined for specific Customers.

* * *

## 8\. Support Services

### 8.1 Support Hours & Coverage

- Standard Support Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM UTC, business days
- Sev 1 – Critical Incident Support: **24 hours per day, 7 days per week**

Career Highways maintains an on-call escalation process for Sev 1 incidents to ensure timely response outside standard business hours.

### 8.2 Support Channels

- Email and chat support are available during standard support hours.
- Sev 1 incidents may be escalated through designated emergency contact procedures provided to Customer upon onboarding.

### 8.3 Response Times

- Initial response for Sev 1 incidents: **≤ 1 hour (24×7)**
- Initial response for Sev 2–4 incidents: **within twenty-four (24) hours during standard support hours**

### 8.4 Customer Success Manager

A designated Customer Success Manager (CSM) will be provided for Customers with private-label implementations.

* * *

## 9\. Service Credits

If Career Highways fails to meet the monthly Uptime Percentage commitment:

| Uptime Percentage | Service Credit |
| --- | --- |
| < 99.0% | 10% of monthly fees |
| < 95.0% | 25% of monthly fees |

Credits are applied to the subsequent billing cycle and represent Customer’s sole and exclusive remedy for availability failures.

* * *

## 10\. Customer Responsibilities

Customer shall: – Use the Services in accordance with the Acceptable Use Policy – Maintain appropriate security controls for Customer-managed environments – Promptly notify Career Highways of suspected incidents or outages

* * *

## 11\. Exclusions & Limitations

This SLA Addendum: – Does not create guarantees beyond those expressly stated – Does not apply to beta or preview features – Is subject to the limitation of liability provisions in the governing agreement

# Liz Eversoll

Chief Executive Officer

![ceo-liz-eversoll](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/6d/liz-eversoll-6dde2ed5.jpg)

[Book A Strategy Session](https://careerhighways.com/liz-eversoll-strategy-session/#book)

[View Case Study](https://careerhighways.com/liz-eversoll-strategy-session/#case-study "#case-study")

## **UNLOCK YOUR WORKFORCE WITH SKILLS — 30 MINUTES WITH LIZ EVERSOLL, CEO**

**CEO-led discussion for executives looking to turn skills data into clear workforce decisions across cost, risk, and productivity.**

**What we’ll discuss (in 30 minutes)**

- **How skills unlock workforce visibility:** See how mapping skills to roles reveals where work is human-critical, transferable across roles, and supported by AI—creating a clear view of your workforce capability.

- **How that drives financial outcomes:** Understand how skills data translates into replacement cost exposure, internal mobility savings, and productivity gains through better deployment and AI alignment.

- **What actions create the most impact:** Identify 1–3 focused steps to improve workforce performance—by activating existing capability, applying AI where it adds value, and strengthening critical roles.

* * *

**Why meet with Liz**Former leader of a **$2.6B software business at CDW** and CEO of Career Highways, Liz works with executive teams to connect skills, roles, and workforce data to **measurable business outcomes**.

* * *

**30 minutes. No slides. No commitment.** A focused working session grounded in real analysis—not theory.

## What to Expect

**30 minutes — CEO-led, outcome-first.** Direct counsel that turns your hiring or skills problem into **1–3 prioritized actions** plus a recommended pilot.

**Why this matters**

Career Highways is building the enterprise workforce intelligence layer that turns skills data into measurable hiring and talent outcomes — this session applies that lens to your top people problem.

**Who should join**

CEO / CHRO / Head of Talent (± a direct operational partner who owns hiring execution).

- Immediate outcome: 1–3 prioritized actions + one recommended pilot.

- Business impact: Faster hires, clearer roles, revealed skills gaps.

- Commitment: 30 minutes, confidential, no obligation — no slides unless you ask.

**Availability:** Limited executive openings.

Loading

## Case Study – Business Solver

![business-solver-case-study-wide](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/e4/business-solver-case-study-wide-e4a0b4d3.jpg)

April 21, 2026

### Transform Talent Strategy: How Businessolver Accelerated Workforce Transformation with Career Highways

Businessolver partnered with Career Highways to build an AI-powered skills foundation and unified career-journey platform that replaced manual role creation, standardized job architecture, and made skills visible across the company. In a 3-month rollout they turned a year-long program into an operational, skills-based talent infrastructure that leaders and employees actually use.

**Core results (quick read):**

- **75% faster** job-architecture implementation (12→3 months)
- **95% reduction** in manual role & skills creation effort
- **2–4 hours saved** per role created/standardized
- **95% of employees** reported better understanding of skills and career pathways

[Read the full Business Solver case study →](https://careerhighways.com/liz-eversoll-strategy-session/#)

# Mark Kendall

Chief Revenue Officer

![mark-kendall](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/a9/WhatsApp-Image-2024-07-03-at-09.59.07_b080677e-a9bc8653.jpg)

[Book A Strategy Session](https://careerhighways.com/mark-kendall-strategy-session/#book)

[View Case Study](https://careerhighways.com/mark-kendall-strategy-session/#case-study "#case-study")

## UNLOCK YOUR WORKFORCE WITH SKILLS — 30 MINUTES WITH Mark Kendall, CRO

**C-Level discussion for executives looking to turn skills data into clear workforce decisions across cost, risk, and productivity.**

**What we’ll discuss (in 30 minutes)**

- How skills unlock workforce visibility: See how mapping skills to roles reveals where work is human-critical, transferable across roles, and supported by AI—creating a clear view of your workforce capability.

- How that drives financial outcomes: Understand how skills data translates into replacement cost exposure, internal mobility savings, and productivity gains through better deployment and AI alignment.

- What actions create the most impact: Identify 1–3 focused steps to improve workforce performance—by activating existing capability, applying AI where it adds value, and strengthening critical roles.

* * *

**Why meet with Mark**A 40-year enterprise leader and former EVP at Hub International — who turns skills intelligence into scalable revenue and measurable workforce productivity.

* * *

**30 minutes. No slides. No commitment.** A focused working session grounded in real analysis—not theory.

## What to Expect

**Who should book**

CEO / CFO / CHRO / Head of Talent / Head of Total Rewards.

**Immediate outcome (what you’ll walk away with)**

- 1–3 prioritized revenue or partnership actions to accelerate adoption or scale pilots (channel, enterprise GTM, or partner model).

- A tight pilot or go-to-market sketch (scope, owners, expected value) tied to hiring, retention, or productivity outcomes.

- A recommended next step (partner roll-out, pilot proposal, or targeted skills-intelligence demo).

**Why this is worth your time**

Mark brings 40 years scaling enterprise relationships and building solutions that improve workforce productivity and retention — experience you can apply immediately to accelerate job-architecture rollouts and skills-based hiring.

**Format & commitment**

30 minutes, confidential, no obligation — C-Level counsel, not a product demo.

## Case Study – Business Solver

![business-solver-case-study-wide](https://careerhighways.com/wp-content/uploads/yootheme/cache/e4/business-solver-case-study-wide-e4a0b4d3.jpg)

April 21, 2026

### Transform Talent Strategy: How Businessolver Accelerated Workforce Transformation with Career Highways

Businessolver partnered with Career Highways to build an AI-powered skills foundation and unified career-journey platform that replaced manual role creation, standardized job architecture, and made skills visible across the company. In a 3-month rollout they turned a year-long program into an operational, skills-based talent infrastructure that leaders and employees actually use.

**Core results (quick read):**

- **75% faster** job-architecture implementation (12→3 months)
- **95% reduction** in manual role & skills creation effort
- **2–4 hours saved** per role created/standardized
- **95% of employees** reported better understanding of skills and career pathways

[Read the full Business Solver case study →](https://careerhighways.com/mark-kendall-strategy-session/#)
